ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecules" (
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecule */,
  "molecule_name" TEXT /* Name of the molecule */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the molecule */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Molecular structure of the molecule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project that the simulation belongs to */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Molecule being simulated */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date that the simulation was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame of simulation data */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Simulation that the frame belongs to */,
  "bond_length" REAL /* Bond length in angstroms */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle in degrees */,
  "dihedral" REAL /* Dihedral angle in degrees */,
  "ub" INTEGER /* Unbound energy value */,
  "imp" INTEGER /* Impedance value */,
  "cmap" INTEGER /* Coulomb map identifier */,
  "vdwaals" REAL /* Van der Waals energy */,
  "eel" REAL /* Electrostatic energy */,
  "1_4_vdw" REAL /* 1-4 Van der Waals energy */,
  "1_4_eel" REAL /* 1-4 Electrostatic energy */,
  "egb" REAL /* Energy of the group of bonds */,
  "esurf" REAL /* Surface energy contribution */,
  "delta_g_gas" REAL /* Change in free energy in gas phase */,
  "delta_g_solv" REAL /* Change in free energy in solvent */,
  "delta_total" REAL /* Total change in free energy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frame was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the frame was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_calculations" (
  "calc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy calculation entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Simulation that the energy calculation belongs to */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Frame that the energy calculation was performed on */,
  "vdwaals_energy" REAL /* Van der Waals energy for the configuration */,
  "electrostatic_energy" REAL /* Electrostatic energy for the configuration */,
  "total_energy" REAL /* Total energy of the configuration */,
  "solvation_energy" REAL /* Solvation energy contribution for the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the energy calculation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the energy calculation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_calculations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_calculations_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES simulation_results ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Simulation that the report was generated from */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date that the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Simulation that the visualization was generated from */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date that the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
